categories.name: STX.CITY Ecosystem
categories.content: STX.CITY Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via STX.CITY.

categories.name: SPL22
categories.content: SPL22 is a hybrid token extension of the Solana blockchain that combines the features of both fungible and non-fungible tokens.

categories.name: IDR Stablecoin
categories.content: A IDR stablecoin is a type of cryptocurrency that is designed to maintain a stable value by being pegged to the Indonesian rupiah.

categories.name: Zodiac-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins related to zodiac signs.

categories.name: Market-Making Solution
categories.content: A Market-Making Solution refers to a service that enhances liquidity in markets by consistently offering buy and sell orders.

categories.name: Pons Launchpad
categories.content: Tokens launched on pons (https://ponsfamily.com/launchpad).

categories.name: CreatorBid Ecosystem
categories.content: CreatorBid Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via creator.bid.

categories.name: Liquid Restaked ETH
categories.content: Liquid Restaked ETH is a tokenized representation of restaked Ethereum that can be traded or used in various DeFi applications.

categories.name: Quest-to-Earn
categories.content: Quest-to-Earn refers to a gamified system in which users complete specific tasks or challenges to earn rewards, which can be in the form of points, tokens, or other incentives.

categories.name: Arcade Games
categories.content: Classic-style games with simple mechanics, high replayability, and score-based progression.

categories.name: Printr Launchpad
categories.content: Printr is chain-abstracted token launchpad with customizable fee models and an on-chain 'Proof of Belief' staking mechanism that rewards long-term community commitment.

categories.name: Liquid Staked HYPE
categories.content: Liquid staked HYPE is a tokenized representation of staked HYPE that can be traded or used in various DeFi applications.

categories.name: Robinhood Chain Meme
categories.content: Meme coins native to Robinhood Chain.

categories.name: Telegram Apps
categories.content: Applications built on the Telegram platform that integrate cryptocurrency or blockchain technology.

categories.name: Duck-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins which are inspired by duck.

categories.name: Insurance
categories.content: Decentralized insurance provides the infrastructure for members to buy cover, underwrite risk, assess claims, and build risk management businesses.

categories.name: Bittensor Subnets
categories.content: Subnets on Bittensor are specialized mini-networks dedicated to specific AI tasks. In each subnet, models (miners) compete to produce high-quality outputs, and their performance is evaluated by validators who assign rankings and allocate TAO rewards accordingly.

categories.name: Pump Fund Portfolio
categories.content: Projects and tokens officially backed by Pump Fund, the venture arm of Pump.fun. These projects are selected for their adherence to "build in public" principles, transparent development, and verified founder commitment.

categories.name: Mascot-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins related to Mascot.

categories.name: TokenSets Ecosystem
categories.content: Interconnected platforms and services built around TokenSets.
